title: The Scoutcopter
description:
THE SCOUTCOPTER GOES BONKBONKBONKBONK

This is one of the reasons why I love the infinite Uber bug in MvM mode.
To do this you need to use the Boston Basher and to crouch while jumping.
And you know what? I'll submit this to the Saxxies. I have nothing to lose, right?

http://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198011478256
